runTitle: Vercel broad QA - frontend and AI assistant evaluation on latest production
coveredSurfaces: landing render and version badge on production
dashboard summary render with total 15 / online 14 / warning 1 / risk 0 / offline 0
dashboard system resource panel render with CPU 35 / Memory 47 / Disk 32
active alerts modal render and dismiss
topology modal render with 15 nodes / 20 edges and dismiss
dashboard AI sidebar opens from warning CTA with prefilled prompt
AI sidebar first-hit response completes with grounded warning analysis
/dashboard/ai-assistant fullscreen workspace render with existing conversation restored
fullscreen workspace follow-up prompt completes with server summary response
browser console error count 0 during landing/login/dashboard/AI workspace flow
skippedSurfaces: Analyst advanced forecast and drilldown flow

expertAssessments.rationale: Landing, login, dashboard, modal/detail pack 일부, AI sidebar, fullscreen workspace를 같은 production session에서 실제 사용자 흐름으로 검증했다.
AI 답변 자체는 유의미하고 grounded했지만, fullscreen workspace에서 analysis basis provenance가 '일반 대화 응답'으로 표시되어 sidebar와의 explainability parity가 깨졌다.
expertAssessments.nextAction: sidebar와 fullscreen workspace 간 analysis basis hydration/source parity를 복구한다.

expertAssessments.rationale: Dashboard summary/resource/top5, /api/health, /api/version, console cleanliness까지 production 기준으로 확인했다.
Latest production deployment dpl_CtSR9Wk698mkgBjyjzLREtfNiC5s on v8.11.11 remained reachable and budget usage stayed normal.

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period reviewed before broad production QA; effective 9.1382 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, chargeCount 8526, no unexpected billed usage spike.

artifacts.label: Dashboard warning card with AI sidebar response
Fullscreen AI workspace with follow-up response
Broad frontend and AI workspace console log

pendingImprovements.title: Fullscreen AI workspace should preserve tool-grounded analysis basis metadata
pendingImprovements.note: release-blocking 아님, tracking-only: dashboard sidebar에서는 tool-grounded basis가 보였지만 fullscreen workspace hydration 후 동일 대화가 '일반 대화 응답'으로 축소 표기됨

notes: Landing and main redirect remained green on production v8.11.11.
Dashboard snapshot during run: total 15, online 14, warning 1, risk 0, offline 0; system resources 35/47/32.
AI sidebar warning analysis response completed successfully and showed warning summary, root-cause estimate, and recommended actions.
Fullscreen workspace restored the conversation and accepted a follow-up summary prompt, but analysis basis metadata regressed to '일반 대화 응답' after hydration.

System Context panel showed stale provider role copy (Cerebras Supervisor/NLQ/Verifier, Groq Analyst/Reporter, Mistral Advisor/Fallback) relative to current routing policy; observed as existing non-blocking copy drift.
browser_console_messages reported 0 errors and 0 warnings across the tested flow.
